evidence.source_title: Ayandeh Bank: How One Family Built a Bank to Feed Its Own Empire - Zamaneh Media
evidence.description: Ansari's banking licence was widely described as a political gift to an Ahmadinejad campaign supporter. Tat Bank was reportedly established with assistance from Mohammad Aliabadi, Ahmadinejad's deputy.

evidence.source_title: Corruption, mismanagement in spotlight as Iran dissolves major private bank - Al Jazeera
evidence.description: Ansari is described as close to former president Mahmoud Ahmadinejad.
